title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Real Estate Agent to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Brigade Group Ventures Solutions:
Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
